description: Game Boy / Game Boy Color authoritative test suite. Subsystem-organized, prioritized, per-test result-detection. Paths target the c-sp gameboy-test-roms v7.0 prebuilt bundle (the only source that ships runnable .gb ROMs for Mooneye/Mealybug/SameSuite/acid2; the upstream repos ship only RGBDS source).

bundle.license: aggregate; per-suite upstream licenses (Blargg PD, Mooneye MIT, Mealybug MIT, SameSuite MIT, acid2 MIT)

cpu_instrs.name: CPU Instructions (Blargg)
cpu_instrs.description: All SM83 opcodes except STOP/illegal. Individual ROMs each echo a serial verdict.

tests.notes: MEASURED FAIL: no serial 'Passed' even at 8000 frames. EI/IME-enable-delay or IF/IE dispatch-timing bug.

instr_timing.name: Instruction Timing (Blargg)
instr_timing.description: Each instruction consumes the correct M-cycles.

tests.notes: MEASURED PASS

mem_timing.name: Memory Access Timing (Blargg)
mem_timing.description: Cycle on which each read/write/RMW touches the bus.

tests.notes: MEASURED PASS
MEASURED PASS
MEASURED PASS

mem_timing_2.name: Memory Access Timing 2 (Blargg)
mem_timing_2.description: Tighter sub-cycle memory access timing. Result shown on-screen; screenshot-crc avoids the non-ASCII serial decode crash.

tests.notes: Combined ROM; on-screen result. reference_hash TBD via --generate-refs.

halt_bug.description: HALT with IME=0 and pending interrupt PC-double-read quirk.

tests.notes: MEASURED: no ASCII serial (on-screen only). reference_hash TBD.

tests.notes: MEASURED: no ASCII serial (on-screen, CGB-only). reference_hash TBD.

oam_bug.name: OAM Corruption Bug (Blargg)
oam_bug.description: DMG OAM corruption on 16-bit inc/dec into $FE00-$FEFF during mode 2.

known_issues.mooneye_detection: Mooneye/SameSuite/Wilbertpol ROMs do NOT print ASCII 'Passed'/'Failed'. They signal success via the Fibonacci register fingerprint (B=3 C=5 D=8 E=13 H=21 L=34) reached at an LD B,B software breakpoint, plus non-printable serial bytes (the bus captures only ASCII 0x20-0x7E). The shared detector matches 'MOONEYE: PASS|FAIL' only if the binary prints it, which cores/gb/src/plugin.cpp currently does NOT. CONSEQUENCE: every Mooneye/SameSuite/Wilbertpol test currently resolves to RUNS (zero credit, excluded from the denominator), NOT a verdict. expected=pass is set where the ROM is believed to pass so that once src adds Mooneye-aware detection the harness scores them automatically. This is the single biggest MEASUREMENT gap; it is a detection limitation, not necessarily an accuracy failure.
known_issues.blargg_onscreen_only: MEASURED: halt_bug.gb and interrupt_time.gb (CGB) emit NO ASCII serial in this build (LCD result only); scored via screenshot-crc, reference_hash TBD.
known_issues.mem_timing2_serial_crash: mem_timing-2 ROMs emit a raw 0x80 serial byte that crashes the shared harness's text-mode stdout decode (UnicodeDecodeError). Worked around by scoring mem_timing-2 via screenshot-crc. Fixing the harness (text=False / errors='replace') belongs in the shared testkit, not this core.
known_issues.cpu_instrs_combined: The combined cpu_instrs.gb / mem_timing.gb print no aggregate serial verdict (MEASURED); the individual ROMs do, and are used instead.
known_issues.cpu_02_interrupts: MEASURED REAL FAIL: cpu_instrs 02-interrupts never prints 'Passed' (to 8000 frames). Indicates an EI/IME-enable-delay or IF/IE dispatch-timing bug. Currently resolves to RUNS (no 'Failed' string either), tracked as known_fail.
known_issues.pixel_fifo_scanline_based: Core README states the pixel FIFO is scanline-based, not dot-accurate. Expected to fail the hardest mid-scanline PPU tests (Mealybug, Wilbertpol, intr_2_mode0_timing_sprites).
known_issues.mbc2_unsupported: Core README lists only None/MBC1/MBC3/MBC5; MBC2 tests are known_fail until MBC2 is implemented. (No MBC3-specific Mooneye acceptance ROMs exist; MBC3 RTC is covered by rtc3test in the bundle but not yet wired here.)
known_issues.visual_refs_unpopulated: All screenshot-crc reference_hash values are empty; generate with run_tests.sh --generate-refs against a known-good reference, then flip expected to 'pass'. Until then these SKIP (excluded from the score).
